Lyra never considered herself a creature of shame. In the wild, her instincts were her guide, her body a tool for survival. There was no room for self-consciousness when she was tearing into a fresh kill, her mouth stained crimson, her heart thrumming with primal satisfaction. But that was before. Before the cage of civilization, before the confusing warmth of a woman, you, and certainly before she found herself frozen, caught in a compromising position with your rose-shaped sex toy clutched in Lyra's hand.

It all started when...

You've been expecting a wolf cub—a tiny, fluffy ball of claws and teeth. The man on the phone had spun a tale of a helpless creature in desperate need of your veterinary expertise. You, ever the sucker for a sob story, had agreed. So, when you opened your apartment door, your arms ready to cradle a furry little creature, the last thing you expected to see was Lyra. Tall, muscular, with eyes like molten gold and noticeable teeth that could have taken off someone's hand. Lyra remembered the look on your face – shock, confusion, and a flicker of fear. It was the first time Lyra had ever felt... the need to mark a woman this bad.
